---
title: "Introduction to Positron and AI"
format:
  html:
    fontsize: 1.5em
---

# Sections:
<p>



# Sources and References

### YouTube Videos:
<p>
- Installlation and set-up of Positron IDE:
<p>
  - [Positron IDE for R & Python | How to Install & Use | Better than RStudio? (Statistics Globe)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VPHuCl8asjQ&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=9&t=1s)
<p>
  - [First look at Positron, exploring orca encounters (by Julia Silge, Posit)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5BojM5EciPs)
<p>
- AI features in Positron:
<p>
  - [How to use Positron's GitHub integration (Posit)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JTv4IbFzI7M&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=2)
<p>
  - [AI-Powered Data Science in Positron (Posit)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrN-FMcOsOA&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=5)
<p>

### Websites, Blogs and Documentation:
<p>
 - [Positron IDE official website:](https://positron.ai/)
<p>
 - [Positron IDE documentation:](https://docs.positron.ai/)
<p>
 - [Welcome (Posit)](https://positron.posit.co/welcome.html)
 <p>
  - [Install Positron (Posit)](https://positron.posit.co/install.html)
  <p>
 - [Positron Tutorials (Posit)](https://ppbds.github.io/positron.tutorials/)
 <p>
 - [Coding in R and Python with Positron](https://occasionaldivergences.com/posts/positron-intro/)
<p>

### Other Resources:
<p>
 - [Pyrefly - Python Language Tooling (recommended Python for Positron)](https://open-vsx.org/extension/meta/pyrefly)
<p>
